bodyTail: urns a random cron expression. domain system.directoryPath Returns a directory path. domain system.fileExt Returns a file extension. domain system.fileName Returns a random file name with extension. domain system.filePath Returns a file path. domain system.fileType Returns a file type. domain system.mimeType Returns a mime-type. domain system.networkInterface Returns a random network interface. domain system.semver Returns a semantic version. domain unit.name Generate a scientific unit name. domain unit.symbol Generate a scientific unit symbol. domain vehicle.bicycle Returns a type of bicycle. domain vehicle.color Returns a vehicle color. domain vehicle.fuel Returns a fuel type. domain vehicle.manufacturer Returns a manufacturer name. domain vehicle.model Returns a vehicle model. domain vehicle.type Returns a vehicle type. domain vehicle.vehicle Returns a random vehicle. domain vehicle.vin Returns a vehicle identification number (VIN). domain vehicle.vrm Returns a vehicle registration number (Vehicle Registration Mark - VRM) domain word.adjective Returns a random adjective. domain word.adverb Returns a random adverb. domain word.conjunction Returns a random conjunction. domain word.interjection Returns a random interjection. domain word.noun Returns a random noun. domain word.preposition Returns a random preposition. domain word.sample Returns a random word, that can be an adjective, adverb, conjunction, interjection, noun, preposition, or verb. domain word.verb Returns a random verb. domain word.words Returns a random string containing some words separated by spaces. domain helpers.arrayElement Returns one random element from the supplied array. faker helpers.arrayElements Returns multiple random elements from the supplied array. faker helpers.fake Interpolates faker template placeholders inside a string and returns the rendered result. faker helpers.fromRegExp Generates a string that matches the supplied regular-expression-style pattern. faker helpers.maybe Calls a callback and returns its value only when faker decides the optional value should be present. faker helpers.multiple Calls a generator callback multiple times and returns the collected results as an array. faker helpers.mustache Replaces {{placeholder}} tokens in a string using values from the supplied data object. faker helpers.rangeToNumber Converts a number or { min, max } range into a concrete number. faker helpers.replaceCreditCardSymbols Replaces credit-card placeholders and computes a valid Luhn checksum for the result. faker helpers.replaceSymbols Replaces placeholder symbols such as # and ? in a string with random digits or letters. faker helpers.shuffle Returns a shuffled copy of the supplied array. faker helpers.slugify Converts a string into a URL-friendly slug. faker helpers.uniqueArray Builds an array of unique values by repeatedly sampling a source until the requested length is reached. faker helpers.weightedArrayElement Returns one value from a weighted array, favoring entries with higher weights. faker number.int Returns a single random integer between zero and the given max value or the given range. Schema: awd.domain.number.int() Parameter Details Name Details min Optional minimum integer. max Optional maximum integer. multipleOf Generated number will be a multiple of the given integer. Parameter Types Name Type Req min number optional max number optional multipleOf number optional Usage Examples Shows number.int when optional params are omitted. Command: number.int Params field: Leave blank Full call: number.int() Returns: 3756200289967619 Shows number.int using min. Command: number.int Params field: (max=10, min=1) Full call: number.int(max=10, min=1) Returns: 5 Shows number.int using max. Command: number.int Params field: (max=5) Full call: number.int(max=5) Returns: 2 Shows number.int using multipleOf. Command: number.int Params field: (multipleOf=1) Full call: number.int(multipleOf=1) Returns: 3756200289967619 Open documentation Cancel Apply

dialogs.text: Select schema method × All Core airline airplane airport animal autoIncrement book chemicalElement color commerce company database datatype date finance food git hacker image internet language literal location lorem music number person phone string system unit vehicle word Faker Recently used enum Enum values allow you to specify a list of discrete options. Use comma-separated values with no quotes, for example "active,inactive,pending" or "enum active,inactive,pending". enum literal Literal data repeats the exact text you enter for every generated row. literal regex Regex patterns generate random values that match the specified expression. regex airline.aircraftType Returns a random aircraft type. domain airline.flightNumber Returns a random flight number. Flight numbers are always 1 to 4 digits long and may include leading zeros. domain airline.iataCode Generate an airline IATA code. domain airline.name Generate an airline name. domain airline.recordLocator Generates a random record locator. Record locators are 6-character alphanumeric booking references. domain airline.seat Generates a random seat. domain airplane.iataTypeCode Generate an airplane IATA type code. domain airplane.name Generate an airplane model name. domain airport.iataCode Generate an airport IATA code. domain airport.name Generate an airport name. domain animal.bear Returns a random bear species. domain animal.bird Returns a random bird species. domain animal.cat Returns a random cat breed. domain animal.cetacean Returns a random cetacean species. domain animal.cow Returns a random cow species. domain animal.crocodilia Returns a random crocodilian species. domain animal.dog Returns a random dog breed. domain animal.fish Returns a random fish species. domain animal.horse Returns a random horse breed. domain animal.insect Returns a random insect species. domain animal.lion Returns a random lion species. domain animal.petName Returns a random pet name. domain animal.rabbit Returns a random rabbit species. domain animal.rodent Returns a random rodent breed. domain animal.snake Returns a random snake species. domain animal.type Returns a random animal type. domain autoIncrement.sequence Generates an incrementing sequence. Values only advance when a generated row is accepted, so constraint-filtered rows do not consume sequence numbers. domain autoIncrement.timestamp Generates a timestamp that starts from a fixed point and increments by the configured amount for each generated row. domain book.author Returns a random author name. domain book.format Returns a random book format. domain book.genre Returns a random genre. domain book.publisher Returns a random publisher. domain book.series Returns a random series. domain book.title Returns a random title. domain chemicalElement.atomicNumber Generate a chemical element atomic number. domain chemicalElement.name Generate a chemical element name. domain chemicalElement.symbol Generate a chemical element symbol. domain color.cmyk Returns a
